encampmentDefinitions.name: Askurgan Monastery
encampmentDefinitions.description: A sanctuary built from the remains of hunted monsters, where the Trueblades train and store their trophies.

effects.summary: Add 1 to renown rolls for fighters with the Hero runemark.
During step 5 of the aftermath sequence, one fighter can be sent forth to roll on the Askurgan Trueblades Lesser Artefacts table.

encampmentDefinitions.name: Palace of Jade
encampmentDefinitions.description: A circle of nine jade obelisks that corrupts the surrounding land.

effects.summary: Add 1 to renown rolls for friendly Heroes.
In aftermath step 5, send one fighter forth to seek treasure and roll on the faction lesser-artefact table.

encampmentDefinitions.name: Chaotic Nexus
encampmentDefinitions.description: A corrupted site used as a Chaos encampment.

effects.summary: Provides a Chaos-specific encampment bonus and access to a dark-boons exploration table.

encampmentDefinitions.name: Proper Bog
encampmentDefinitions.description: Restored wild bogland used as a Destruction encampment.

effects.summary: Adds 1 to renown rolls for heroes.
Allows one fighter to search the bog during the aftermath sequence.

encampmentDefinitions.name: Trade Route
encampmentDefinitions.description: A secured trade route supporting the warband.

effects.summary: Provides an Order-specific encampment bonus and access to a trade-route exploration table.

encampmentDefinitions.name: Unearthed Tomb
encampmentDefinitions.description: An ancient crypt secured as a base of operations.

effects.summary: Adds 1 to renown rolls for heroes.
Allows one fighter to explore the catacombs during the aftermath sequence.

encampmentDefinitions.name: Hunting Encampment
encampmentDefinitions.description: A grisly hunting camp used by the Royal Beastflayers.

effects.summary: Add 1 to renown rolls for friendly Heroes.
In aftermath step 5, send one fighter forth to hunt and roll on the faction lesser-artefact table.
Provides the faction-specific encampment benefit and exploration rewards.
Provides the faction-specific encampment benefit and exploration rewards.
Provides the faction-specific encampment benefit and exploration rewards.

encampmentDefinitions.name: Oozing Midden
encampmentDefinitions.description: A heap of half-devoured corpses and discarded wargear used as a Gorger Mawpack lair.

effects.summary: Add 1 to renown rolls for friendly Heroes.
In aftermath step 5, send one fighter to root through the refuse and roll on the Gorger Mawpack lesser-artefact table.

encampmentDefinitions.name: Fyreslayer Mercenary Compound
encampmentDefinitions.description: A mercenary encampment where the warband can take contracts for additional rewards.

effects.summary: Add 1 to renown rolls made for fighters from the warband.
In aftermath step 5, send one fighter forth to take a mercenary contract; completing it grants a chosen Gnarlwood lesser artefact.

encampmentDefinitions.name: Forward Base
encampmentDefinitions.description: A fortified niche in the Sundered Scales where Gargoylians provide small blessings during periods of rest.

effects.summary: Add 2 to recovery rolls made for fighters in the warband.
In aftermath step 5, send one fighter forth and roll on the Wildercorps Hunter Lesser Artefacts table.

explorationTable.name: Promising Location
explorationTable.summary: The next encampment relocation costs 5 less glory; duplicate unused results are re-rolled.

explorationTable.name: Choke Point
explorationTable.summary: In the next campaign battle as defender, gain 1 additional wild die in each initiative phase; duplicate unused results are re-rolled.

explorationTable.name: Stingshrubs
explorationTable.summary: In the next campaign battle as attacker, friendly non-Beast attacks deal +1 critical-hit damage; duplicate unused results are re-rolled.

explorationTable.name: Vital Stream
explorationTable.summary: In the next campaign battle, add 1 Strength to friendly melee attacks; duplicate unused results are re-rolled.

explorationTable.name: Safer Path
explorationTable.summary: In the next generated campaign battleplan, generate two results for each battleplan component and choose which to use; duplicate unused results are re-rolled.

explorationTable.name: Gristlefruit
explorationTable.summary: Consumable bonus action: add 3 Toughness to the bearer until the end of the battle round.

explorationTable.name: Trailhound Treats
explorationTable.summary: Perishable, once per battle: each friendly Trailhound within 6 inches makes a bonus move or disengage and ends as close as possible to the bearer.

explorationTable.name: Erstwhile Companion
explorationTable.summary: Perishable: enemy fighters within 3 inches of the bearer cannot use abilities or make reactions.

explorationTable.name: Unlucky Hero
explorationTable.summary: Immediately choose and receive one artefact of power from the Plundered Trophies table.

questDefinitions.name: Hone Your Crimson Craft
questDefinitions.description: A nominated Askurgan Exemplar perfects the martial disciplines of the Askurga Renkai.

progress.label: Perfection score
increments: Add 1 for each enemy fighter taken down by that fighter's attack action or ability.
Add 1 for each critical hit scored by that fighter.

completion.summary: Complete once the nominated fighter's perfection score is 6 or more.

reward.summary: Give the nominated fighter one Askurgan Trueblades heroic trait.

questDefinitions.name: Hunt a Mighty Predator
questDefinitions.description: Track a worthy monster through the Gnarlwood and defeat the rival warband encountered at its lair.

progress.label: Hunt score
increments: Add 1 after each battle.
Add 5 whenever the warband relocates its encampment.

completion.summary: At a hunt score of 7 or more, win the Worthy Blood quest battle and complete the quest in the aftermath sequence.

reward.summary: Relocate to the Askurgan Monastery without spending glory.

questDefinitions.name: Relics of the Immortal Order
questDefinitions.description: Recover one selected relic by gaining progress through controlling objectives, carrying treasure and winning battles.

progress.label: Progress score
increments: Add 1 after a battle if the warband controlled any objectives or a friendly fighter carried treasure.
Add 1 after a battle if the warband won.

completion.summary: Complete once the progress score is 5 or more.

reward.summary: Obtain the selected artefact of power from the Relics of the Immortal Order table.

questDefinitions.name: Champion of Chaos
questDefinitions.description: A nominated hero proves their worth through slaughter.

reward.summary: Give the nominated fighter a Chaos heroic trait.

questDefinitions.name: Desecrate the Land
questDefinitions.description: Find and corrupt a powerful site.

reward.summary: Relocate the warband to the Chaotic Nexus encampment.

questDefinitions.name: Gifts of the Dark Gods
questDefinitions.description: Recover a selected Chaos artefact of power.

reward.summary: Gain the selected artefact of power.

questDefinitions.name: Behold the Obelisk
questDefinitions.description: A nominated hero sacrifices a worthy enemy and earns a heroic trait.

completion.summary: Complete if an enemy Hero or a fighter with 20 or more Wounds was taken down by the nominated fighter.

reward.summary: Give the nominated fighter one Jade Obelisk heroic trait.

questDefinitions.name: Broken Faith
questDefinitions.description: Defile enough enemy icons and sites of worship to establish a Palace of Jade.

progress.label: Iconoclast score
increments: Add 1 per controlled objective.
Add 1 per friendly treasure carrier.
Add 1 per taken-down enemy Hero, Champion or Icon Bearer.
Add 1 if a friendly Jade Obelisk Icon Bearer remains on the battlefield.

completion.summary: At 10 or more, win the Your Works Are Unmade quest battle.

reward.summary: Relocate to the Palace of Jade without spending glory.

questDefinitions.name: The Path of Splintered Limbs
questDefinitions.description: Breach the Gnarlwood and recover one selected Marvel of Jade.

progress.label: Breaching score
increments: Add 1 when an enemy is taken down in an activation using Hammering Strikes or Rock-shattering Blow.
Add 2 in aftermath step 4 if the warband won.
Optionally send one fighter forth and add a die roll; on 1, make an injury roll for that fighter.

completion.summary: Complete in aftermath step 4 when the breaching score is 12 or more.

reward.summary: Obtain the selected Marvel of Jade.

questDefinitions.name: Lord of Death
questDefinitions.description: A nominated hero destroys an enemy hero.

reward.summary: Give the nominated fighter a Death heroic trait.

questDefinitions.name: Treasures of the Grave
questDefinitions.description: Recover a selected Death artefact of power.

reward.summary: Gain the selected artefact of power.

questDefinitions.name: What Lies Below
questDefinitions.description: Discover and seize an ancient crypt.

reward.summary: Relocate the warband to the Unearthed Tomb encampment.

questDefinitions.name: Retrieve The Heirloom
questDefinitions.description: Track down a thief and restore the honour of one nominated non-Beast fighter.

progress.label: Tracking score
increments: Add 1 when an enemy treasure carrier is taken down.
Add 1 when an enemy within 3 inches of an objective is taken down.
Add 1 when an enemy with 2 or more runemarks is taken down.
Add 2 in aftermath step 4 if the warband won.

completion.summary: At 12 or more, win the Slay the Thief, Seize the Prize quest battle.

reward.summary: Give the nominated fighter one Knightly Virtue heroic trait.

questDefinitions.name: Slay The Beast In Its Lair
questDefinitions.description: Drive off a great beast and claim one selected Relic of the Realm.

progress.label: Quest score
increments: Add 1 for each controlled objective, friendly treasure carrier, and taken-down enemy with 2 or more runemarks.
Add 5 if any enemy Beast was taken down.
Add 10 if any enemy Monster was taken down.

completion.summary: Complete in aftermath step 4 when the quest score is 10 or more.

reward.summary: Obtain the selected Relic of the Realm.

questDefinitions.sourcePage: Slay The Beast In Its Lair

questDefinitions.name: The Trials of Knighthood
questDefinitions.description: Complete three different knightly labours.

progress.label: Labour score
increments: Complete one selected labour per battle; the same labour cannot be selected twice before quest completion.

completion.summary: Complete in aftermath step 4 when the labour score is 3 or more.

reward.summary: Relocate to the Hunting Encampment without spending glory.

reward.summary: Give the nominated fighter a Destruction heroic trait.

questDefinitions.name: Making A Midden
questDefinitions.description: Build a midden from the remains of defeated enemies and defend it in a quest battle.

progress.label: Leftovers score
increments: When a friendly melee attack takes down an enemy, roll 3 dice; if the total is less than that enemy's Wounds, add 1.
After a battle, add 1 if at least half of the enemy warband was taken down.

completion.summary: At 6 or more, win the Cleaning Up quest battle and complete the quest in aftermath step 4.

reward.summary: Relocate to the Oozing Midden without spending glory.

questDefinitions.name: Slaughtermaster's Blessing
questDefinitions.description: A chosen Clawback offers sacrifices to the Gulping God to earn a heroic trait.

progress.label: Sacrifice score
increments: Add 1 whenever an enemy fighter is taken down within 4 inches of the chosen mouth of the Gulping God.
After a battle, add 1 if the opposing warband's leader was taken down.

completion.summary: Complete once the sacrifice score is 4 or more.

reward.summary: Give the chosen Clawback one Gorger Mawpack heroic trait.

questDefinitions.name: The Butcher's Bidding
questDefinitions.description: Make offerings to a local Butcher and earn one selected artefact from the Butcher's Bounty.

progress.label: Offering score
increments: Add 1 whenever a friendly melee attack takes down an enemy bearing a lesser artefact or artefact of power.
After a battle, add 1 for each controlled objective and each friendly treasure carrier.

completion.summary: Complete once the offering score is 4 or more.

reward.summary: Obtain the selected artefact of power from the Butcher's Bounty table.

questDefinitions.name: Establish Trade Route
questDefinitions.description: Secure a route through the Gnarlwood.

reward.summary: Relocate the warband to the Trade Route encampment.

questDefinitions.description: A nominated hero proves themselves against an enemy hero.

reward.summary: Give the nominated fighter an Order heroic trait.

questDefinitions.description: A chosen hero seeks a deed worthy of a new heroic trait.

completion.summary: The nominated hero takes down an enemy hero.

reward.summary: Give the nominated fighter a universal heroic trait.

questDefinitions.name: Explore the Gnarlwood
questDefinitions.description: An ongoing expedition to discover encampment locations.

reward.summary: Relocate to the discovered encampment.

questDefinitions.name: Fight For Glory
questDefinitions.description: An ongoing quest focused on winning campaign battles.

completion.summary: Win the required number of campaign battles.

reward.summary: Gain campaign glory and renown rewards.

questDefinitions.name: Hunt The Beast
questDefinitions.description: Track and defeat a dangerous monster.

completion.summary: Reach the hunt threshold and win the quest battle.

reward.summary: Gain the quest reward associated with the slain beast.

questDefinitions.name: Secure a Powerful Ally
questDefinitions.description: Earn the allegiance of an eligible ally.

completion.summary: Reach the required score and win the quest battle.

reward.summary: Add the selected ally to the warband roster.

questDefinitions.name: Treasures Of The Gnarlwood
questDefinitions.description: Search for a selected artefact of power hidden in the Gnarlwood.

reward.summary: Gain the selected artefact of power.

questDefinitions.name: Born of Haste
questDefinitions.description: Create the conditions needed to accelerate the hatching of a Magmadroth egg.

progress.label: Progress score
increments: Add 1 for each table quarter with fewer enemy than friendly fighters wholly within it.
Add 1 for each enemy Monster or Beast taken down.
Add 1 for each swamp board feature with one or more friendly fighters within 1 inch.
Add 1 for each full round a friendly Destroyer remains within 1 inch of qualifying terrain beside a swamp feature.

completion.summary: At 7 or more progress, win the Enhanced Incubation quest battle and complete the quest in aftermath step 4.

reward.summary: Relocate to the Fyreslayer Mercenary Compound without spending glory.

questDefinitions.name: Seeking Power
questDefinitions.description: Follow a Kyndledroth to recover one selected artefact from the Artefacts of Flame and Scale table.

progress.label: Tracking score
increments: At the end of each round, add 1 if a friendly Vulkyn Flameseeker Beast controls an objective.
At the end of each round, add 1 if such a fighter is alone with friendly models in a table quarter.
Add 2 in aftermath step 4 if the warband won its last campaign battle.

completion.summary: Complete in aftermath step 4 when the tracking score is 5 or more.

reward.summary: Obtain the selected Artefact of Flame and Scale.

questDefinitions.name: The Unborn Lost
questDefinitions.description: A chosen Vulkyn Runefather searches for a lost clutch of Magmadroth eggs and proves worthy of a heroic trait.

progress.label: Hatchling score
increments: Add 1 after a battle if the warband holds one or more treasure tokens.
Add 1 after a battle if the warband controls one or more objectives.
Add 1 for each table quarter containing one or more friendly fighters.
Add 1 if a friendly Beast ended each activation wholly within a different table quarter each round and remains on the battlefield.
Add 1 in aftermath step 4 if the warband won its last campaign battle.

completion.summary: Complete in aftermath step 4 when the hatchling score is 8 or more.

reward.summary: Give the chosen Vulkyn Runefather one Guardians of the Scale heroic trait.

questDefinitions.name: Born Survivor
questDefinitions.description: A nominated Wildercorps Warden proves their ability to keep the warband alive.

progress.label: Survivor score
increments: At the end of each battle, add 1 for each friendly fighter still on the battlefield.
progress.nominatedTarget: One Wildercorps Warden eligible to gain a heroic trait.

completion.summary: Complete in step 4 of the aftermath sequence when the survivor score is 12 or more.

reward.summary: Give the nominated Wildercorps Warden one Wildercorps Hunters heroic trait.

questDefinitions.name: Breakout
questDefinitions.description: Rescue a beleaguered Cities of Sigmar hero from an encircling enemy.

progress.label: Quest battle
progress.requirement: Hot Pursuit completed; Breakout not yet completed.

completion.summary: Win the To the Rescue quest battle and complete the quest in aftermath step 4.

reward.summary: Add the beleaguered hero to the warband roster in aftermath step 6 without spending glory.

questBattle.name: To the Rescue

beleagueredHero.eligibility: Any fighter with both Hero and Cities of Sigmar runemarks.
rules: The beleaguered hero cannot be activated.
The attacker's fighters treat the hero as friendly; the defender treats the hero as enemy.
An attacker fighter using Respite within 1 inch can heal the hero instead if no enemy is within 1 inch.
Look Out, Sir! reaction redirects all damage from an attack targeting the hero to the reacting fighter.

questBattle.victory: The defender wins if the beleaguered hero is taken down; otherwise the attacker wins.

questDefinitions.name: Dead Or Alive
questDefinitions.description: Track a randomly selected enemy target across campaign battles and claim a chosen Plundered Trophy.

progress.label: Trophy score
increments: Add 1 at battle end if the randomly determined enemy target was taken down.
Add 1 at battle end if the warband won.
progress.setup: After deployment, randomly select an enemy battle group and then randomly select one fighter in that group as the target.

completion.summary: Complete once the trophy score is 3 or more.

reward.summary: Obtain the selected artefact of power from the Plundered Trophies table.

questDefinitions.name: Distress Signal
questDefinitions.description: Follow a concealed distress signal through the Sundered Scales.

progress.label: Tracking score
increments: Add 2 at battle end if a friendly fighter was within 3 inches of the secretly selected battlefield edge at the end of the final round.
Add 1 each time a fighter is sent forth during the aftermath sequence.
progress.requirement: The warband has not completed this quest.

completion.summary: Complete once the tracking score is 5 or more.

reward.summary: Roll once on the Core Book lesser artefacts table.

questDefinitions.name: Do or Die
questDefinitions.description: Accumulate feats against dangerous enemies, then defeat the warband's fated foe.

progress.label: Feats score
increments: Add 1 when an enemy with 20 or more Wounds and/or the Hero runemark is taken down.
Add 1 when an enemy is taken down by a friendly non-Beast fighter's melee attack.
Add 1 when a friendly fighter's injury heals in step 6 of the aftermath sequence.

completion.summary: At 5 or more feats, win the Fated Foe quest battle and complete the quest in aftermath step 4.

reward.summary: Relocate to the Forward Base encampment without spending glory.

questBattle.name: Fated Foe
specialRules: The attacker's dagger arrives in battle round 3 and may deploy from any battlefield-edge point.
questBattle.victory: The attacker wins if the defender's leader is taken down; otherwise the defender wins.

questDefinitions.name: Hot Pursuit
questDefinitions.description: Race toward a randomly determined battlefield edge to close on the beleaguered ally.

progress.label: Pursuit score
increments: At battle end, add 1 for each friendly fighter within 3 inches of the randomly determined goal edge.
progress.requirement: Distress Signal completed; Hot Pursuit not yet completed.

completion.summary: Complete once the pursuit score is 10 or more.

reward.summary: Receive D6 glory.
